name: Techno Quartz Inc.
summary: Techno Quartz Inc. provides high-precision quartz glass, silicon, and ceramic products primarily for use in semiconductor and liquid crystal display manufacturing equipment, and analytics equipment in Japan. It offers vertical quartz boats; quartz pedestals; high-precision welded bell jars; gas distribution plates; quartz rings; quartz reaction tubes; and machining solutions. The company also provides single crystal silicon products that are used in semiconductor and flat panel displays manufacturing processes. In addition, it offers CVD Yttria coated parts; and contract cleaning services for ceramic, silicon, metals, and coated products. The company was incorporated in 1976 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Techno Quartz Inc. is a subsidiary of GL Sciences Inc.
